title: The Roman Emperor Who Declared War on Seashells
title_full: The Roman Emperor Who Declared War on Seashells #Shorts #facts #ancient history #roman empire
description:
What was he thinking?

This Roman Emperor had a bizarre vendetta against seashells, ordering his soldiers to collect them as spoils of war! Find out the strange reason behind Emperor Tiberius's war on the sea.
Follow for more!
